name: emoji-kitchen
title: Emoji Mashups
description: Discover and copy Google Emoji Kitchen mashups fast. Browse unique emoji combinations and use them as fun, expressive images in messages and posts. Copy/paste or save.
author: corey_o_neal

commands.name: index
commands.title: Search Emoji Kitchen
commands.description: Search for emojis and see their mashups.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you want to publish your extension to the Raycast Store instead, please add raycast-extension to your keywords in package.json and run \`npx @raycast/api@latest publish\`.

" && exit 1
